'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 32''', also styled as '''''Star Wars'' Magazine 32''',  was the 32nd issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Prequel Update]]
*New Hopes
*[[Jawa's Corner]]
*The Cantina
*[[Star Wars Q&A|''Star Wars'' Q&A]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[Producing Episode II: Rick McCallum]]"
*:<small>Episode II Producer [[Rick McCallum]] takes time out in Australia to talk exclusively with ''Star Wars Magazine''.</small>
*"[[Back to the Future for Episode II: Peter Walpole]]"
*:<small>How do you recreate a significant ''Star Wars'' location almost 25 years later? That was one of many tasks facing Episode II Set Decorator [[Peter Walpole]], who talks exclusively with ''Star Wars Magazine''.</small>
*"Classics in Pen and Ink"
*:<small>What are the best ''Star Wars'' comics featuring each of the main classic trilogy characters? Find out here!</small>
*"That's No Moon! Top Ten ''Star Wars'' Spaceships!"
*:<small>What is ''Star Wars'' about if not dramatic confrontations in space? Why do the bad guys always have the coolest ships? Here's our favourite ''Star Wars'' spaceships, counting down from 10 to one. Can you guess the winner?</small>
